data.content: @azure-typespec-author I added `...Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentityProperty;` which updates all my existing API versions and introduces a breaking change. I want to introduce the properties of the spread model '...ManagedServiceIdentityProperty' in API version 2025-05-04-preview only.

arguments.request: I added `...Azure.ResourceManager.ManagedServiceIdentityProperty;` to my resource model using spread, which updates all my existing API versions and introduces a breaking change. I want to introduce the properties of the spread model '...ManagedServiceIdentityProperty' only in API version 2025-05-04-preview. How do I version this correctly so older API versions are not affected?
